name: Bug Report

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Which Component?

- [ ] Agent (specify: e.g., `@blog-writer`)
- [ ] Skill (specify: e.g., `visual-rendering`)
- [ ] Visual rendering (PNG/SVG/Mermaid)
- [ ] Archive script
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open VS Code with this workspace
2. Select model: ...
3. Run: `@agent-name ...`
4. See error/unexpected output

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **VS Code version**: 
- **Copilot Chat version**: 
- **Model used**: [e.g., Claude Sonnet 4]
- **Python version**: 

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log snippets.
